candidates.context: Used as an unregistered Tier-2-equivalent source (per verification.md §1) to corroborate Grok 4.5 pricing/spec claims in grok-4-5-release. Established tech-industry outlet with editorial standards and named authors; propose for registration as Tier 2, type rss (feed: https://www.infoworld.com/index.rss, unverified this run).

query_notes: 'Grok 4.5 xAI release SWE-bench benchmark' and site:x.ai searches both returned high-signal, on-topic results the same day as the release — worth keeping as a discovery.yaml pattern for major-model-release verification (site-scoped search as x.ai/news fetch fallback, per the known-blocker note in the run brief).
